problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion may resolve How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
